# --------------------------
# The bin settings, spectra values and errors of the reconstructed energy spectra of prompt signals of U235, Pu239, PuCombo and total are on lines 8 to 121

The covariance matrix of U235, PuCombo and total are on lines 203 to 277
# --------------------------

# The covariance matrix is of size 75X75 and describes the correlation between a total of 75 bins of the three energy spectra of U235, PuCombo and total. (unit: 10^{-86}/MeV^2/fission^2)
